---
title: "How's the weather across India right now?"
description: "Live temperature, humidity, and air quality across India's major metropolitan cities."
page-layout: full
toc: false
sidebar: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <link href="https://api.mapbox.com/mapbox-gl-js/v3.6.0/mapbox-gl.css" rel="stylesheet">
      <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/uplot@1.6.30/dist/uPlot.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
      <link rel="stylesheet" href="/static/india-weather/india-weather.css">
include-after-body:
  - text: |
      <script src="https://api.mapbox.com/mapbox-gl-js/v3.6.0/mapbox-gl.js"></script>
      <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/uplot@1.6.30/dist/uPlot.iife.min.js"></script>
      <script src="/static/india-weather/india-weather.js"></script>
---

```{=html}
<div class="iw-root">
  <div class="iw-meta">
    <span id="iw-updated" class="iw-updated"></span>
  </div>

  <div class="iw-grid">
    <div class="iw-map-wrap">
      <div id="iw-map" role="img" aria-label="Map of Indian metros with live weather"></div>
      <div id="iw-status" class="iw-status">Loading map...</div>
    </div>

    <div class="iw-leaderboard" role="complementary" aria-label="City rankings">
      <div class="iw-tabs" role="tablist">
        <button class="iw-tab iw-active" type="button" data-tab="hottest" role="tab">Hottest</button>
        <button class="iw-tab" type="button" data-tab="worst-air" role="tab">Worst air</button>
        <button class="iw-tab" type="button" data-tab="humid" role="tab">Most humid</button>
      </div>
      <ul id="iw-leaderboard-list" class="iw-list"></ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <section class="iw-history" aria-label="History charts">
    <div class="iw-history-header">
      <div>
        <h3>History</h3>
        <div class="iw-history-sub">Temperature, humidity, and AQI trends. Pick a city and a time range.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="iw-history-controls">
        <label class="iw-city-picker">
          <span class="iw-sr">City</span>
          <select id="iw-history-city" aria-label="Select city"></select>
        </label>
        <div class="iw-range" role="tablist" aria-label="Time range">
          <button class="iw-range-btn iw-active" type="button" data-range="24h" role="tab">24h</button>
          <button class="iw-range-btn" type="button" data-range="7d" role="tab">7d</button>
          <button class="iw-range-btn" type="button" data-range="30d" role="tab">30d</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="iw-charts">
      <figure class="iw-chart-card">
        <figcaption>Air Quality Index <span id="iw-aqi-source" class="iw-chart-source">(US AQI · Open-Meteo)</span></figcaption>
        <div id="iw-chart-aqi" class="iw-chart"></div>
      </figure>
      <figure class="iw-chart-card">
        <figcaption>Temperature <span class="iw-chart-source">(°C · Open-Meteo)</span></figcaption>
        <div id="iw-chart-temp" class="iw-chart"></div>
      </figure>
      <figure class="iw-chart-card">
        <figcaption>Relative humidity <span class="iw-chart-source">(% · Open-Meteo)</span></figcaption>
        <div id="iw-chart-humidity" class="iw-chart"></div>
      </figure>
    </div>
    <div id="iw-history-status" class="iw-history-status"></div>
  </section>

  <p class="iw-footnote">
    Live tile: weather from <a href="https://open-meteo.com/" rel="noopener">Open-Meteo</a>,
    AQI from <a href="https://aqicn.org/" rel="noopener">WAQI</a> (CPCB-station average) on the
    <a href="https://cpcb.nic.in/" rel="noopener">Indian CPCB</a> band scale.
    History charts: temperature and humidity are always Open-Meteo. The 24h AQI series matches
    the live tile (CPCB stations via WAQI, accumulated forward from rollout); the 7d / 30d AQI
    series uses Open-Meteo (CAMS, US AQI) because WAQI's historical endpoint is paywalled. The
    two AQI sources are on different scales, so 7d / 30d bars will not always agree with the
    live CPCB number. Data refreshes every 15 minutes.
  </p>
</div>
```
